exploration_notes: The SASL broker-side authentication in Apache Kafka is centered around these key components: (1) **SaslServerAuthenticator** - the main broker-side authenticator that implements the Authenticator interface, handles the SASL handshake protocol, mechanism negotiation, and manages the authentication state machine lifecycle. (2) **SaslChannelBuilder** - wires up the SASL infrastructure, creates SaslServerAuthenticator instances, registers SASL providers (PlainSaslServerProvider, ScramSaslServerProvi
